prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次依次约 14900→14997→17857→16068→15902，整体呈波动后移趋势；2023 年出现明显后移（17857），2024 年回弹至 16068，2025 年微升至 15902，近两年趋于稳定在 15900–16100 区间；该校在辽宁物理类招生计划 2021 年 97 人、2022–2024 年各 106 人、2025 年增至 112 人；2026 年计划 114 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招 2 人，扩幅约 1.8%，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升，2021 年第 76 名→2026 年第 69 名，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力获认可；2022 年曾因学术不端事件获偏负面评价，但近年声誉平稳，未出现重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 75（一般），短视频平台曝光量处于中游水平，未见报考关注度异常升温信号；第五轮学科评估中，作物学、植物保护、畜牧学、草学 4 个学科获评 A-，农林学科特色鲜明，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业 2024–2026 年持续高热推荐，该校物理类招生专业涵盖上述热门方向，对考生吸引力增强；辽宁省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 20 万，较 2025 年（历史类+物理类约 19.97 万）略有增加，物理类考生规模预计小幅上升，竞争略加剧；该校位于陕西咸阳，非本省高校，在辽宁无显著地域偏好加成。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 15902、2026 年计划小幅扩招 1.8%、软科排名持续上升、工科热门专业吸引力增强及本省考生总数略增等因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低录取位次较 2025 年略有后移（竞争略加剧）；预测最低位次约 16102 名，区间 15602–16602 名。

- 光电信息科学与工程

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 15602–16602 内，建议以二档优势农林学科（农学、动物医学等）为主攻方向，一档热门工科（电气、计算机、电子信息）作为冲刺，三档传统农林类专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（ <15602）时可重点冲刺一档热门工科专业；位次接近区间上限（>16602）时建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 14900→14997→17857→16068→15902, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; in 2023, there was a significant backward shift (17857), rebounding to 16068 in 2024, and slightly rising to 15902 in 2025, stabilizing in the 15900–16100 range in recent two years; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning was 97 in 2021, 106 each from 2022 to 2024, and increased to 112 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 114, a slight expansion of 2 compared to 2025, an increase of about 1.8%, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising, from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, reflecting growing recognition of its comprehensive strength; in 2022, it received somewhat negative evaluations due to an academic misconduct incident, but its reputation has been stable in recent years without major negative public opinion; its Douyin popularity ranking is 75th (average), with mid-level exposure on short video platforms, showing no abnormal surge in application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, four disciplines—Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grassland Science—were rated A-, highlighting distinctive agricultural and forestry disciplines, which have a stable appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently hot and recommended from 2024 to 2026; the university's Physics Category enrollment includes these popular directions, enhancing its appeal to candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Liaoning Gaokao is about 200,000, slightly higher than 2025 (approximately 199,700 for History and Physics categories combined), with the Physics Category candidate scale expected to increase slightly, intensifying competition slightly; the university is located in Xianyang, Shaanxi, not a local university in Liaoning, so it has no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 15902, the slight 1.8% expansion in the 2026 plan, the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, the increased appeal of popular engineering majors, and the slight increase in the total number of local candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift slightly backward (competition slightly intensifies); the predicted minimum ranking is about 16102, with a range of 15602–16602.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Engineering (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Mechanical and Electronic Engineering, Vehicle Engineering)
- Veterinary Medicine (Excellent Class)
- Agronomy (Agronomy Category)
- Biological Sciences
- Water Resources Engineering
- Food Science and Engineering
- Chemistry.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Forestry Engineering
- Horticulture (Horticulture Category)
- Animal Science
- Grassland Science
- Facility Agriculture Science and Engineering
- Aquaculture
- Landscape Architecture.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 15602–16602, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 advantageous agricultural and forestry disciplines (e.g., Agronomy, Veterinary Medicine) as the main direction, use Tier 1 popular engineering majors (e.g., Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information) as reach options, and rely on Tier 3 traditional agricultural and forestry majors as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (<15602), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular engineering majors; if your ranking is near the upper bound (>16602), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science ranking has been rising (76th in 2021→69th in 2026), with steadily improving comprehensive strength; recent reputation is stable, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average, with no abnormal signals in application attention; it has 4 A- disciplines: Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grassland Science, all with agricultural and forestry characteristics, which have no direct disciplinary mapping to History Category majors (Law, Chinese International Education, English, Public Administration, Sociology, Russian), but the 985 platform provides an overall endorsement effect for liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language/Literature were trending hot in 2024–2026 (recommended); the university offers Law, Chinese International Education, etc., benefiting from the warming of popular liberal arts majors; the total number of general college entrance exam takers in Liaoning in 2026 is about 200,000, with the History Category candidate scale expected to slightly increase compared to 2025 (56,324), slightly intensifying competition; the university is located in Shaanxi, not a local university, with no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2475, the 2026 plan reduction of 7.7% (easing competition), the warming of popular liberal arts majors (e.g., Law), and a slight increase in the total number of local candidates, the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 is expected to slightly advance compared to 2025 (competition slightly eases); the predicted minimum ranking is about 2341, with a range of 1920–2762.
